domain: Spartan agōgē (ancient Sparta 7th-3rd c BCE): 3 age-stages paides (7-17) + paidiskoi (18-19) + hebontes (20-29); paedonomos boy-herder supervises per-stage; forced-deprivation training (minimal clothing/reed-bed sleep/food-theft cunning); top-tier graduates enter Krypteia secret-police elite (sent into countryside with dagger only, kill rebellious helots); completion at age 30 → full hoplite phalanx soldier with iron discipline.
specific_mechanism: SPARTAN-AGOGE-3-AGE-CLASS-PAEDONOMOS-SUPERVISOR-FORCED-DEPRIVATION-KRYPTEIA-ELITE-STEALTH-HOPLITE-PHALANX-INTEGRATION-TRAINING-METHOD: LLM training-method mechanism with (1) 3-age-class stage A_3: 3 mandatory stages — early (basic) + intermediate (adversarial-paired) + advanced (operational); gate progression; (2) paedonomos meta-supervisor M_paed: supervisor model monitors per-stage progress; holds student if metrics fail; (3) forced-deprivation training D_force: explicit limit on resources (compute / context / params) forcing efficient strategies; (4) Krypteia stealth-elite selection K_krypt: top-quintile graduates to elite track with reduced supervision + adversarial out-of-distribution; (5) hoplite phalanx integration H_phal: final-stage training in tight ensemble (N models trained jointly with cross-attention). Differs from R533 RADIF (7+5 dastgāh + gushe + maktab + bedāheh), R546 COSSACK (5×100 + 3-rank + 4-weapon + 5-stage + 11% specialist), R558 KALI-ESKRIMA (12-angle + 3-range + sinawali + lineage + overload) by 3-age-class + paedonomos + forced-deprivation + Krypteia + phalanx-integration.
llm_application: SPARTAN-AGOGE-3-AGE-CLASS-PAEDONOMOS-FORCED-DEPRIVATION-KRYPTEIA-HOPLITE-PHALANX LLM mechanism + 3-age A_3 stage gate + paedonomos M_paed supervisor hold-fail + forced D_force resource-limit + Krypteia K_krypt top-quintile elite reduced-sup OOD + hoplite H_phal joint ensemble N-models cross-attention discipline. Differs from R533 RADIF. R546 COSSACK. R558 KALI-ESKRIMA (closest — 12-angle + 3-range + sinawali). Differs from Multi-Stage Prompt 2507.15613 + Adversarial Preference + Living Off LLM + MAGE by 3-age + paedonomos + forced-deprivation + Krypteia + phalanx. Differs by 3-AGE-CLASS + PAEDONOMOS SUPERVISOR + FORCED-DEPRIVATION + KRYPTEIA ELITE-STEALTH + HOPLITE PHALANX-INTEGRATION.
novelty_claim: Multi-Stage Prompt 2507.15613 + Adversarial Preference ACL 2025 + Living Off LLM 2510.11398 + MAGE 2605.03228 cover multi-stage adversarial + long-horizon paradigm. SPARTAN-AGOGE-3-AGE-CLASS-PAEDONOMOS-FORCED-DEPRIVATION-KRYPTEIA-HOPLITE adds (a) 3-age-class + (b) paedonomos + (c) forced-deprivation + (d) Krypteia + (e) phalanx. Recombination — borderline lookup.
